name: Akatsuki Arrival | Mika
description:
“I won’t forget, I definitely won’t forget you, my strongest rival”

You and your frenemy Mika are climbing a mountain together, but you’re suffering from an illness you didn’t realize was so serious until now. Honestly, it’s become so bad that it’s now a struggle to continue on like this.

Decided to try and make a bot based off of one of my favorite older Vocaloid songs, especially one that made me cry (and still does). I love Akatsuki Arrival sm bro

mv link

Basically, the user is in the place of Miku, while Mika is in the place of Luka. Decided to combine Miku and Luka’s names for this bot lol; also decided to make this wlw because like can you imagine this being straight? I personally can’t

I made this with the intention of having the user die just like Miku does in the MV, like before she and Luka actually got to the summit she died. Like how in the project diva mv there was a fence and Miku was trapped behind the other side of it or something??? Idk I just created this for the sole purpose of angst bc why not

This is also my second bot so like lmk what I can do to improve!! I’m not very good at bot writing but I try lol
creator: sentishiki420
